module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent public surface for remoc-backed frontdoor Session/Task endpoints, the session-scoped loop engine runtime with model-produced Plan/Job planning over executable task steps split by a nested two-level TaskStepKind model/tool/user boundary, ModelTaskStepKind model phases for user intent analysis, content summarization, task planning, and response composition, UserTaskStepKind user phases for decision and authorization, draft TaskBrief-based session/task context views, model-facing context data under the model module, model backend interfaces, Deepseek backend implementation, and future retrieval/tool interfaces, where model-driven tool calls carry the shared common::protocol ToolSchema/ToolParameter types across the session boundary.

childModules.name: engine
childModules.purpose: Session-scoped loop engine runtime with lifecycle errors, session brief and task trace interface drafts, TaskBrief task summaries, task runtime events, nested two-level TaskStepKind model/tool/user boundaries, ModelTaskStepKind model phases for user intent analysis, content summarization, task planning, and response composition, UserTaskStepKind user phases for decision and authorization, model-produced Plan/Job planning structures that group executable TaskSteps, and model streaming through chat response segments.

childModules.name: frontdoor
childModules.purpose: Agent frontdoor Session and Task endpoints backed by remoc/TCP, aligned with engine-owned task execution returning runtime event receivers and streamed chat response segment payloads.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Public model request interface, backend type selection, crate-internal ModelContext data, backend implementation boundary, model error definitions, and streaming Deepseek backend implementation through common external namespaces.
